subtitle: 窑火如歌，兄弟如线

characters.name: 张寄
characters.description: 年长、稳重、理性。他负责规划、守护、在关键时刻拉住冲动的弟弟。是'线'的锚点。

keyLines.line: 往南走，找能烧窑的土地，不能丢。手艺不能断。志元，看好你弟弟。
各位乡人，我们兄弟只求一处容身，烧出的瓷，与大家共分。

characters.name: 张志元
characters.description: 年轻、敏感、天赋异禀。他能听见'土在唱歌'，感知火候的微妙变化。是'线'的延伸。

keyLines.line: 哥，没有你这盏灯，我哪能坚持学业，这里都参着你的补贴呢。

notes: 原始脚本中兄弟姓名存在混用（'章生一'、'张志耀'、'张寄'）。本项目以修订版'哥哥=张寄，弟弟=张志元'为准。

shots.visual: 初始动画，角色面朝向天空，送别弟弟
shots.prompt: Song dynasty Chinese ink painting, a young man looking up at the sky, saying farewell to his younger brother, minimalist brush strokes, paper texture, soft light, celadon tones, side view

shots.visual: 一双布满老茧的手。老林问老张：'你弟去上学你咋不知道？'老张：'我哪晓得，他年轻，我支持。'列车迅速驶过长焦
shots.audio:
老林：你弟去上学你咋不知道？
老张：我哪晓得，他年轻，我支持。
shots.prompt: Extreme close-up of weathered calloused hands of an elderly Chinese potter, a fast-moving train blurring in telephoto background, warm sepia light, cinematic, shallow depth of field

shots.visual: 老匠人独坐桌前，看着瓷器，手滑险些掉落，角色接住。镜头另一端，角色在教育局申请教师资格和项目上报。缺了一块
shots.prompt: Medium shot, an old artisan sitting alone at a wooden table examining a chipped celadon vase, his hand slipping, another person catching it, split screen with education bureau, vintage Chinese interior, paper lamp, soft mood

shots.visual: 碎瓷底款——'章生'二字。角色进入窑洞巡查
shots.prompt: Macro shot of broken porcelain bottom with Chinese characters '章生' carved in Song dynasty seal style, dust particles, dramatic side light, dark kiln background

shots.visual: '哥窑的'哥'，是谁？'
shots.prompt: Pure black background, white Song dynasty calligraphy text '哥窑的哥，是谁？', ancient Chinese seal script, minimalist, ethereal floating dust
Misty mountain landscape, ancient Chinese village silhouette, fog rolling, dawn light, cinematic atmosphere, Song dynasty era

shots.visual: 战马、烽火、流民、南下……
shots.prompt: Montage of war horses charging, beacon fires burning, refugees fleeing south, Song dynasty Chinese war, dust, fire, dramatic chiaroscuro, ink and color

shots.visual: 北方窑口，角色在水墨空间寻找，模糊差量镜头，窑火被践踏熄灭
shots.audio: 马蹄声、瓷器碎裂声、哭喊
shots.prompt: Wide shot of northern Chinese kiln ruins, smoke rising, kiln fires trampled and extinguished, two brothers searching in ink-wash haze, dilapidated dragon kiln, broken pottery scattered, melancholic blue-gray tones

shots.visual: 两个包袱塞入兄弟手中——一个是瓷土，一个是家谱
shots.audio: 往南走，找能烧窑的土地，不能丢。手艺不能断。志元，看好你弟弟。
shots.prompt: Medium shot, an old father placing two cloth bundles into his sons' hands, one with white porcelain clay, the other with a family genealogy scroll, candlelit Chinese interior, emotional moment, Song dynasty robes

shots.visual: 兄弟二人背影，骑马，张寄拿起纸张和梅子青瓷，渐行渐远
shots.prompt: Wide shot from behind, two brothers on horseback riding away into misty distance, one holding papers and a plum-green celadon vase, mountains fading into haze, melancholic dawn, epic cinematic

shots.visual: 路途上，张寄指着远方山峦，对弟弟说着什么
shots.audio: 吾弟，你看那山，像不像咱家窑口的轮廓？
shots.prompt: Medium shot, an elder brother pointing at distant mountain ridges while speaking to his younger brother on a mountain path, autumn trees, golden afternoon light, Song dynasty travel robes

shots.visual: 队伍穿越瓯江，江水映着夕阳如血
shots.prompt: Wide shot, a small group of travelers crossing Ou River at sunset, water reflecting blood-red sky, wooden boat, silk robes, golden hour light, Song dynasty southern China

shots.visual: 丽水群山，晨雾中一座山谷土质泛红——紫金土
shots.prompt: Aerial view of Lishui mountains at dawn, morning mist drifting through valleys, a hidden valley with reddish-purple soil, ethereal atmosphere, traditional Chinese landscape painting style

shots.visual: 张志元突然蹲下，抓起一把土，眼神发亮
shots.prompt: Medium shot, a young man suddenly crouching down, scooping up reddish soil with bright eyes, surprise and joy on face, misty valley background, Song dynasty clothing, golden morning light

shots.visual: 张寄看着弟弟，笑了——那笑容里有欣慰，有骄傲
shots.prompt: Two-shot, the elder brother looking at younger brother with a proud and reassuring smile, misty valley, morning light, Song dynasty Chinese brothers, emotional cinematic moment

shots.visual: 山谷中，兄弟二人徒手清理坡地，身后是原始森林
shots.prompt: Wide shot, two brothers clearing a hillside with bare hands in a valley, primitive forest behind them, axes and tools, hard labor, morning sun, Song dynasty China

shots.visual: 张寄丈量坡度，用树枝在地上画出窑体轮廓
shots.audio: 龙窑要依山而建，火才能顺着山势往上走。
shots.prompt: Medium shot, an elder brother measuring slope angle with a stick, drawing dragon kiln outline on the ground, focused expression, hillside terrain, Song dynasty

shots.visual: 张志元用半块家传窑砖比对新挖的窑土，神色凝重
shots.prompt: Close-up, a younger brother comparing half a family heirloom kiln brick with newly dug soil, serious contemplative expression, hands holding both pieces, soft side light, Song dynasty

shots.visual: 兄弟二人并肩夯土，动作默契如一
shots.prompt: Medium shot, two brothers tamping earth side by side, perfectly synchronized movements, hillside dragon kiln under construction, dust rising, golden afternoon, Song dynasty China

shots.visual: 汗水滴入泥土，张寄的手磨出血泡
shots.prompt: Close-up, sweat dripping into packed earth, blood blisters on the elder brother's palm, intense physical labor, dramatic side light, Song dynasty

shots.visual: 张志元摇头，继续夯土。张寄默默递来一块布裹住弟弟的手
shots.prompt: Medium shot, younger brother shaking his head and continuing work, elder brother silently wrapping a cloth around his brother's hand, emotional silence, hillside kiln, soft warm light

shots.visual: 窑体渐成，当地山民前来围观，有人摇头，有人好奇
shots.audio: 议论声：'外乡人，能烧出啥？'
shots.prompt: Wide shot, partially built dragon kiln, local mountain villagers gathered around watching, some shaking heads, some curious, mountains in background, Song dynasty southern China

shots.visual: 张寄向山民拱手，言语恳切
shots.audio: 各位乡人，我们兄弟只求一处容身，烧出的瓷，与大家共分。
shots.prompt: Medium shot, the elder brother bowing with hands clasped to local villagers, sincere humble expression, partially built kiln in background, warm afternoon light, Song dynasty

shots.visual: 一位老者微微点头，转身离去
shots.prompt: Close-up, an elderly local villager nodding slightly with wise expression, then turning and walking away, soft side light, Song dynasty southern China

shots.visual: 第一窑装窑，张志元亲手摆放每一件坯体，神情如仪式
shots.prompt: Wide shot inside dragon kiln, a younger brother carefully placing each greenware body with ritual-like reverence, soft candlelight, Song dynasty, ceramic craftsman

shots.visual: 张寄在窑口点燃第一把火，火光映红兄弟二人的脸
shots.prompt: Medium shot, elder brother lighting the first fire at kiln mouth, flames illuminating both brothers' faces with warm red glow, dramatic lighting, first firing ceremony, Song dynasty

shots.visual: 张志元闭眼倾听窑火的声音，嘴唇微动
shots.prompt: Close-up, younger brother with closed eyes listening to kiln fire, lips slightly moving, firelight flickering on face, intense concentration, Song dynasty

shots.visual: 龙窑彻夜燃烧，火光从窑孔透出，如龙身鳞片
shots.prompt: Wide shot, dragon kiln burning through the night, firelight glowing through kiln holes like dragon scales, mountains in darkness, dramatic cinematic, Song dynasty

shots.visual: 兄弟二人轮流守夜，一个在窑前添柴，一个在草棚打盹
shots.prompt: Medium shot alternating silhouettes, one brother stoking kiln fire while other dozes in thatched hut, night scene, firelight and moonlight, Song dynasty

shots.visual: 开窑时刻。张寄用铁钩打开窑门，白烟涌出
shots.prompt: Close-up, an iron hook opening kiln door, white steam billowing out, dramatic moment of unveiling, side light, Song dynasty dragon kiln

shots.visual: 烟散，第一件青瓷出窑——釉色如玉，却未开片
shots.prompt: Macro shot, the first celadon vase emerging from kiln smoke, jade-like glaze without crackle pattern, soft diffused light, breathtaking beauty, Song dynasty ceramic

shots.visual: 几匹快马驰入山谷，官府旗帜飘扬
shots.prompt: Wide shot, several fast horses galloping into a valley, official government banners fluttering, dust rising, dramatic entrance, Song dynasty China

shots.visual: 一位官员下马，身后随从捧着木匣
shots.audio: 朝廷有令，龙泉青瓷可贡于临安，特来查验。
shots.prompt: Medium shot, an imperial official dismounting from horse, attendants behind holding wooden boxes, official robes and hat, dragon kiln in background, Song dynasty southern China

shots.visual: 张志元紧张地看向哥哥，张寄微微点头
shots.prompt: Close-up, younger brother nervously looking at elder brother, elder brother giving a slight nod of reassurance, subtle emotional exchange, side light, Song dynasty

shots.visual: 张寄呈上第二窑出窑的青瓷——釉色更润，隐隐有细纹
shots.prompt: Medium shot, elder brother presenting celadon vase from second firing, glaze with subtle fine crackle pattern, official examining it carefully, daylight, Song dynasty

shots.visual: 官员眼中闪过惊讶，手指抚过釉面细纹
shots.audio: 这纹路……如冰裂，却浑然天成？
shots.prompt: Macro shot, official's surprised eyes, fingers gently touching fine crackle pattern on glaze, surprise and admiration, dramatic side light, Song dynasty celadon

shots.visual: 张志元低头
shots.audio: 回大人，是火候所致，非有意为之。（声音微颤）
shots.prompt: Medium shot, younger brother lowering head humbly, slight voice trembling, official and attendants visible, modest posture, soft light, Song dynasty

shots.visual: 官员笑了，打开木匣，取出一方印
shots.audio: 无意之得，方为天工。此窑，准予贡品之印。
shots.prompt: Close-up, official smiling and opening wooden box, taking out a square seal, official red lacquer box, imperial seal of approval, Song dynasty ceremonial moment

shots.visual: 印文——'龙泉章氏'——盖在瓷底
shots.prompt: Macro shot, seal imprint '龙泉章氏' being stamped on porcelain bottom, red seal paste, Chinese characters in seal script, dramatic moment, Song dynasty celadon

shots.visual: 山民们围拢过来，脸上的疑虑化为笑容
shots.prompt: Wide shot, mountain villagers gathering around, doubt turning to smiles, celebratory atmosphere, dragon kiln smoking in background, joyful moment, Song dynasty

shots.visual: 张寄将印递给弟弟，张志元却摇头，把哥哥的手一起按在印上
shots.audio: 哥，没有你这盏灯，我哪能坚持学业，这里都参着你的补贴呢。
shots.prompt: Medium shot, elder brother passing seal to younger, younger brother shaking head and placing both their hands on the seal together, emotional moment, kiln light, Song dynasty
Two-shot, two brothers standing together, emotional silence, wind blowing, dramatic sky, kiln smoke, Song dynasty southern China

shots.visual: 龙窑炊烟升起，山谷中人影忙碌，一片生机
shots.prompt: Aerial view, dragon kiln smoke rising, busy figures in valley, vibrant life, golden hour, mountains in background, Song dynasty Longquan

shots.visual: 窑烧制中，张志元彻夜未眠，守在窑前
shots.prompt: Wide shot, younger brother staying awake all night watching kiln firing, exhausted but determined, firelight, predawn darkness, Song dynasty dragon kiln

shots.visual: 张志元突然站起，耳朵贴近窑壁——声音不对
shots.prompt: Close-up, younger brother suddenly standing, ear pressed against kiln wall, alert and concerned, firelight flickering, sense of alarm, Song dynasty

shots.visual: 张寄冲过来，兄弟二人对视——火光映着紧张的脸
shots.prompt: Medium shot, elder brother rushing over, two brothers facing each other, firelight on their tense faces, dramatic moment, Song dynasty kiln

shots.visual: 张志元眼神复杂——恐惧、期待、疯狂交织
shots.prompt: Macro shot, younger brother's eyes showing complex emotions - fear, anticipation, madness intermingling, fire reflection in eyes, intense moment, Song dynasty

shots.visual: 窑火突然转旺，窑孔中喷出金色火焰
shots.prompt: Wide shot, kiln fire suddenly intensifying, golden flames bursting from kiln holes, dramatic explosion of light, dangerous moment, Song dynasty dragon kiln

shots.visual: 张寄一把拉住要冲上去的弟弟
shots.prompt: Close-up, elder brother grabbing younger brother's arm to stop him from rushing in, protective gesture, firelight, urgent moment, Song dynasty

shots.visual: 兄弟二人并肩站在窑前，火光将他们的影子投在山壁上，如一人
shots.prompt: Two-shot, two brothers standing side by side before kiln, their combined shadow cast on mountain wall like a single figure, dramatic firelight silhouette, Song dynasty
Pure black screen, total silence, dramatic pause, anticipation, Song dynasty cinematic moment

shots.visual: 开窑。一片瓷缓缓取出——釉面开片，金丝铁线，前所未见
shots.prompt: Macro shot, a porcelain piece slowly removed from kiln, glaze with gold-silver-iron wire crackle pattern like never before, breathtaking beauty, soft light, Song dynasty Ge ware

shots.visual: 张志元颤抖的手抚过瓷片，眼泪滑落
shots.prompt: Close-up, younger brother's trembling hand touching the porcelain piece, tears sliding down, emotional climax, soft side light, Song dynasty

shots.visual: 张寄、张志元，二人望着这片瓷
shots.audio: 把这些带回去，我会传承下去，你不必留下。
shots.prompt: Medium shot, the two brothers looking at the Ge ware piece together, emotional and proud, dawn light breaking, Song dynasty kiln

shots.visual: 晨曦中，龙窑炊烟袅袅，兄弟二人并肩坐在窑口
shots.prompt: Wide shot, dragon kiln with wisps of smoke in morning light, two brothers sitting side by side at kiln mouth, peaceful dawn, birds singing, Song dynasty

shots.visual: 张寄指着东方初升的太阳，对弟弟说着什么
shots.prompt: Medium shot, elder brother pointing at the rising sun in the east, speaking to younger brother, hopeful expression, dawn light, Song dynasty

shots.visual: 张志元笑了，那笑容里有释然，有感激
shots.prompt: Close-up, younger brother smiling with relief and gratitude, warm dawn light, emotional release, soft side light, Song dynasty

shots.visual: 一片新瓷放在二人中间，釉面开片如兄弟并肩的轨迹
shots.prompt: Macro shot, a new porcelain piece between two brothers, glaze crackle pattern resembling the trajectory of brothers standing side by side, reflection of light, Song dynasty Ge ware

shots.visual: 丽水大地，龙窑如龙，盘踞山间，窑火不灭
shots.prompt: Aerial view, Lishui landscape, dragon kilns coiling through mountains like dragons, eternal kiln fires, epic scale, guqin music, Song dynasty Longquan

shots.visual: '哥窑之'哥'，非长幼之序，乃'歌'之古字——窑火如歌，兄弟如线。'
shots.prompt: Pure black background, white Chinese calligraphy '哥窑之哥，非长幼之序，乃歌之古字——窑火如歌，兄弟如线。', seal script, ethereal, final guqin note

shots.visual: 角色在两个方向，在同一个地方，张寄递给张志元
shots.prompt: Ending scene, two characters in two directions converging at one place, elder brother passing something to younger brother, fade out, soft golden light, Song dynasty

shots.visual: 两个时代的背影重叠，结尾，黑场
shots.prompt: Two silhouettes from different eras overlapping and merging into one, fade to black, ethereal, time collapse, Song dynasty and modern times
